feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - Business Content MM
entry.content:
Hello experts,
Could someone tell me if there is a SAP Datasphere Business Content package for the MM module, or at least if there is something pre-built for the Material.

Regards,
Leonel

entry.title: Question about replication flow in initial mode with the status "Retrying"
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question about replication flow in "Initial" mode.

I have put some replication flow (all in "initial") in a task chain. When i run the task for the first time, the data loading works fine, but when i retry to run the same task chain to update my data, some replication flow are in status "Running (Retrying Objects)" (even if the replication is not a delta).I don't understant why.

Datapshere try to run the loading but the same message appears :"The source connector has accepted the initial load partitioning request. The next attempt will be after ..."

Do you know why init replication flow still retrying to load data ? (is not a delta)

Do you already have the same issue ? 

Thanks for the help,

Best regards

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Datasphere CLI - Create Object with --input and node.js
entry.content:
Hello community,

I am trying to create an object with the Datasphere CLI with node.js, but I cannot figure out the correct syntax for the command.

As described in the documentation for the CLI there is the paramater "--input" to use a stringified-json to create an object (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d0ecd6f297ac40249072a44df0549c1a/6f5c65f209004751aa48f9682ee2ec45.html?locale=en-US#create-objects). Unfortunately I couldn't find any example explaining the syntax of the used stringified-json.

I have successfully created an object with the parameter "--file-path" and a JSON file. But when I stringify this file in node.js and try the command with this stringified JSON, I get the error message "Failed to obtain an object name from the provided CSN code".

I have also tried to escape the quotation marks in the JSON file with "\" and with "`".

The code with escaped quotation marks looks like this: 

 

const options4 = {     
"--space": "SP_IB_006",     
"--technical-name": "T3",     
"--input": "{\"definitions\":{\"T3\":{\"kind\":\"entity\",\"@EndUserText.label\":\"T3\",\"@ObjectModel.modelingPattern\":{\"#\":\"DATA_STRUCTURE\"},\"@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities\":[{\"#\":\"DATA_STRUCTURE\"}],\"elements\":{\"ID\":{\"@EndUserText.label\":\"ID\",\"type\":\"cds.String\",\"length\":100,\"key\":true,\"notNull\":true},\"Name\":{\"@EndUserText.label\":\"Name\",\"type\":\"cds.String\",\"length\":100}}}}}",     
"--host": "<HOST_OF_DSP>",       
"--passcode": "",         
};       

try {      
const retrieveCommand = await commands2["objects local-tables create"](options4);   
} catch (err) {    
console.log(err);   
}

 

 

In powershell I could successfully create the object by using the following command:

 

datasphere objects local-tables create --space SP_IB_006 --technical-name T3 --input "{`"definitions`":{`"T3`":{`"kind`":`"entity`",`"@EndUserText.label`":`"T3`",`"@ObjectModel.modelingPattern`":{`"#`":`"DATA_STRUCTURE`"},`"@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities`":[{`"#`":`"DATA_STRUCTURE`"}],`"elements`":{`"ID`":{`"@EndUserText.label`":`"ID`",`"type`":`"cds.String`",`"length`":100,`"key`":true,`"notNull`":true},`"Name`":{`"@EndUserText.label`":`"Name`",`"type`":`"cds.String`",`"length`":100}}}}}"

 

 

Does anyone know, how to use the "--input"-paramater in node.js correctly?

Best Regards,
Björn

entry.title: Eclipse BW Bridge Project: Logon to the service instance has failed.
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the latest Eclipse version (2024-12) installed with the latest ADT and MDT. I try to add a BW bridge project by extracting the URL from the service key. I get prompted to login and do so successfully on an external browser window. As soon as I do, I get an error in Eclipse "Logon to the service instance has failed." I can't find anything related to it elsewhere. Has anyone come across it?

entry.title: Does datasphere work good with ECC or should it be with S4/Hana
entry.content:
Hello

Gurus,

I would like to know that if SAP Datasphere with work fine with ECC 6.0 as far as performance and all the features are concerned or Is it best delivered in when connected with S4/HANA.

We have ECC 6.0 and our roadmap to implement S4 in 2027 but we are trying to do PoC  on Datasphere which is connected with ECC and I am just wondering what are the advantages or pros & cons of datasphere connected with ECC or should we wait for S4 and then implement datasphere.

Thanks for your advice in advance.

Regards

entry.title: SAP DATASPHERE HANDSON Course materials
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please share the course materials Handson for SAP Datasphere

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Integration with Board
entry.content:
Hi there,

has anyone yet tried to integrate Datasphere data with Board? We have tried to connect the two insatnces via API's but this unfortunately did not work. If connection does not work an automated way to import/export data between the two instances would also be very helpful.

Many thanks in advance,

Moritz

entry.title: How to find data source, extractor, CDS views for time info object
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I like to know how do I find the data sources, extractors and CDS views which has any time characteristics. In other words I like to know that my time related info objects such as 0calmonth or 0calweek or 0fiscper info objects how do I know in which data sources, extractors and CDS views are using these info objects.

If I go to "where used-list" I dont see this information but only ADSO, Queries transformations etc.

I know there is a table name RSOSFIELDMAP which we can use in classic BW, t-code SE 11 to see the mapping from data sources for an object but this t-code is not working for me in BW 4/HANA.

Do I have to use Eclipse or HANA studio or can I use RSA1 in BW 4/HANA environment.

Thanks and much appreciated.

Regards

entry.title: Unable to Create Target Table in SAP Datasphere: Error The target table 'Table 1' is not created an
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I am currently learning SAP Datasphere and working on a dataflow that involves tables from an SAP ECC system. While attempting to create and deploy the target table "Table 1," I encountered the following error:

The target table "Table 1" is not created and deployed.

Additionally, when I remove the target table, I receive this error:

The operator "Join 5" has unconnected input/output.

I have ensured that all joins are configured correctly and the source tables (VBAK, VBAP, MARA, MARC, KNA1, and ADRC) are loaded properly. However, I am stuck at this stage and unable to proceed with creating and deploying the target table.

Can someone guide me on how to resolve this issue? Are there any specific steps or configurations

Priyanka

entry.title: Connection SAP SEM BCS to SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi community, 

I am currently trying to connect a SAP SCM BCS Business Consolidation (SEM BCS)  to SAP Datasphere
Is this possible analogue to a BW System? Which connector can I use and are there any critical prerequisits I need to consider?
In https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-sap-bw-bridge-overview-and-technical-deep-dive/ba-p/13494915 is just mentioned, that the SAP BW Bridge is not an option. 

thank you in advance,

entry.title: SAP Datasphere and Open connectors what is supposed to be "access method BULK" ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a very slow Data Flow in Datasphere, due to the fact that a source is from an Open Connector connection.

The Dataflow is very slow, i don't know if it is due to the connection between the source and SAP Integration suite, or between SAP integration suite and dataflows, or inside the dataflow itself.

What is my idea based on observations?

With open connectors the datatypes set for column of type STRING is "STRING(5000)"  (for every STRING columns in the source!!!).

So a possible problem that I found is that when I raise batch size the dataflow => it runs into an error and say "out of memory". This makes me think that dataflow for some reason preallocate memory based on datatypes of the columns. Many columns like "IDs" that may have up to 10 character are treated as STRING(5000).

And this datatype can not be changed in the source property inside Datasphere.

But this is all hypothetical based on observations.

Another observation is that the first rows are written with high speed, the last rows are incredibly slow. this makes me think that the extraction made from the open connector do something like this:

 

read the first 1000 rows and process them,

read the first 2000 rows and process the last 1000.

..

read the first 100000 rows and process the last 1000.

I believe the rows are fetched multiple times from a source and only the last are processed, and this due to the times it takes to download the content (around 200K rows x 100 columns (many of which have a STRING datatype)).

 

A thing that I notice is that we have options inside dataflows that are specific for Open Connectors.

and that are not documented in me.sap.com nor in help.sap.com.

 

So my question is what exactly do the option "Access Method" under the Advanced panel of a source of a dataflow in case of Open connectors?

EDIT: Another problem I found is that with this option ON, the columns with datatype timestamp from the source will generate an error in dataflow execution. => this BULK option is not usable...

Best Regards,

Alberto

entry.title: Unable to Access Security Page in SAP Datasphere Trial Account for User Management
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently using an SAP Datasphere trial account while following the course "Introduction to SAP Datasphere Administration".

The issue I encountered is as follows:
- The trial account does not allow me to access the Security page under Administration.
- I am unable to view, create, or manage users because my assigned user lacks the necessary roles.
- This issue prevents me from completing the "Add Users and Assign Roles in SAP Datasphere" section of the course.

Could you please assist how to enable the required roles or providing guidance to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Datasphere Analytic Model oData: 404 Resource Not Found
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to write the correct URL in order to retrieve data from an AM we have on our Datasphere tenant.

The AM has multiple filter variables, 2 of which are mandatory. The mandatory variables are START_DATE and END_DATE. I currently have my URL formed the following way:

https://<tenant>.cloud.sap/api/v1/dwc/consumption/analytical/<space>/<am_id>/<am_id>(START_DATE=2023-12-29,END_DATE=2023-12-29)/Set

This results in 

{"status":404,"message":"Resource not found"}

If I request the metadata for the AM, it works fine and returns the structure

https://<tenant>.cloud.sap/api/v1/dwc/consumption/analytical/<space>/<am_id>/$metadata

 What am I doing wrong to not get any data back? Are there any restrictions? How can I troubleshoot this?

Thanks

entry.title: Datasphere Task Chain Mail Notifications are not working
entry.content:
Herkese merhaba

Aşağıdaki gibi alt görev zincirlerini içeren bir ana görev zinciri oluşturdum: 

İşlem başarıyla veya başarısızlıkla tamamlandığında bana bildirimde bulunması için hem alt zincirler hem de ana zincir için e-posta bildirimleri ayarladım. Ancak, başarılı veya başarısız olduğunda e-posta göndermiyor.


Bir Görev Zinciri başarısız bir şekilde tamamlandığında ve e-posta gönderilemediğinde oluşan hatayla ilgili bir SAP Notu buldum:  SAP Notu 0003440103  Bu Not, başarısız görev zinciri görevleri için Datasphere'de bir hata olduğunu belirtir.
Başarılı Görev Zinciri görevleri için de benzer bir durum var mı, yoksa eksik bir e-posta yapılandırması mı var yoksa başka bir sorun mu var?
Aylar önce görev zincirini ilk denediğimde aldığım e-posta bildiriminin ekran görüntüsünü gönderiyorum.

Bilgisi olan varsa bilgi verirse sevinirim.

entry.title: DS Analytic Model oData: all/any value for parameters
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an Analytic Model that has  some variables/parameters. When I preview the data only the START_DATE and END_DATE are mandatory. However, when I'm using the oData URL Generator to create URL for data consumption, I'm prompted to fill out all possible variables (see screenshot). 

Question 1: Why is that I need to pass a value for all variables?

Question 2: What can I put to signify all/any value (equivalent to leaving a variable blank in the Data Preview selection prompt)? For example how can I pass a selection for all values for 0PLANT?

entry.title: Load BW On Hana DSO/CUBE into DataSphere( Configuration)
entry.content:
Hi All,

We got Licensees for Datasphere Premium Outbound and we are trying to connect to BW on Hana system and load DSO/Cubes via Datasphere.

Initially i created an SAP BW connection and was able to successfully connect to our BW system.But unable to view any DSO/Cubes .

Do i need to do any configuration in BW for BW objects to show up in Data sphere.

As of now i could see only my BPC objects.

Once this is successful i will be creating an Abap connection and want to use D.S replication flows to move data to 3rd party systems.

Any help on this is much appreciated.

Thanks,

Chaitanya.

entry.title: Amount is lying in customer account post reversing the billing doc
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created the billing document then reversed the same but still the amount is lying in customer account.
Thanks in advance;

Kiran

entry.title: Request for Assistance in Accessing Metadata table for Data Integration Monitor in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Could you please assist us in locating the metadata table for the Data Integration Monitor related to flows in SAP Datasphere? (See the attached screenshot of the Reference tab.)

I am currently trying to access the table "SAP_CONTENT$TEC"."REPLICATIONFLOW_RUN_DETAILS" to retrieve replication-related success and failure metadata information. However, I am encountering an "Insufficient Privilege" error.

While there is no immediate business impact from this issue, resolving it will greatly help us in identifying and troubleshooting replication-related issues more effectively. Could you kindly help by assigning the necessary permissions to the "SAP_CONTENT$TEC" schema? Alternatively, if there are other database tables that contain metadata related to replication or data flows (e.g., success, failure, start date, end date, records processed), could you guide us to those?

Your assistance is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Not able to access Table created in SAP HANA Cloud with Datasphere Replication
entry.content:
Hi team,

We are following a scenario for replicating data from Datasphere to SAP HANA Cloud

Created a Replication scenario in Datasphere for a table "KNA1" . This table is visible in our  container schema after replication as below . There are other tables also created in this container schema through CAPM entity creation.

The below table has no name space attached as it is directly created from Replication

Created a hdb procedure in db/src folder of our CAPM project that access the tables from both CAPM created tables and table created with Data sphere Replication .

but while accessing the tables created through Replication we are getting an issue while deploying .

The file requires "db://KNA1" which is not provided by any file [8212001] (STDERR, APP/TASK/deploy)#
Other tables which are created with CAPM framework has no issue when accessed with procedures but only tables created with a Replication scenario of Datasphere in our schema has the issue.
 
Please let us know if we have missed any thing while accessing these tables.
 
Regards
Prasad

entry.title: Skip Datasphere Log in pop-up screen in SAC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any possibilty that we can skip Datasphere log in Pop-up screen in SAC? due to that pop-up page our reports loading duration takes longer time. We are login with SSO.

Many thanks in advance!

SAP Datasphere SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Single Sign-On
